  Log:
  mez_xml is a templte engine. It generates a Python template module for a
  XML or XHTML file.

      http://hg.assembla.com/mez_xml/
  
  Latest Versions:
  
      http://www.assembla.com/spaces/files/mez_xml
  
  WWW: http://trac-hg.assembla.com/mez_xml
